query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN createdAt >= '2026-01-13' THEN 'Esta semana'
    ELSE 'Semana passada'
  END as periodo,
  DAYNAME(createdAt) as dia,
  COUNT(*) as qtd_pedidos,
  SUM(total) as faturamento
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'completed'
GROUP BY periodo, DAYNAME(createdAt), DAYOFWEEK(createdAt)
ORDER BY periodo DESC, DAYOFWEEK(createdAt);
